overview.description: The Corgi International Developed Equities 15% Structured Buffer ETF - May (IDMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF, using FLEX options to provide the price return of iShares MSCI EAFE ETF to a cap while providing a buffer against the first 15% decline on an annual basis. This series begins on May 1 of each year. IDMY was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
